title: Candace Owens breaks silence after Andrew Kolvet chat leak as Charlie Kirk show clip leaves viewers uneasy
summary_full: Candace Owens faced fresh online backlash after a strange Charlie Kirk show clip and a leaked chat screenshot went viral. A controversial line from the chat sparked strong reactions, but Owens said it was taken out of context and meant as a joke. The debate now centers on authenticity, editing, and whether the full story is being shown.
